Nearby theorems
Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  on2recsov Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem on2recsov 8638
Description: Calculate the value of the double ordinal recursion operator. (Contributed by Scott Fenton, 3-Sep-2024.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
on2recs.1 ⊢ 𝐹 = frecs({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), 𝐺)
Assertion
Ref Expression
on2recsov ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (𝐴𝐹𝐵) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))))
Distinct variable group:   𝑥,𝑦
Allowed substitution hints:   𝐴(𝑥,𝑦)   𝐵(𝑥,𝑦)   𝐹(𝑥,𝑦)   𝐺(𝑥,𝑦)
Proof of Theorem on2recsov
StepHypRef Expression
1 df-ov 7399 . . 3 ⊢ (𝐴𝐹𝐵) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩)
2 opelxp 5683 . . . 4 ⊢ (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ ∈ (On × On) ↔ (𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On))
3 eqid 2762 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} = {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}
4 onfr 6385 . . . . . . . . 9 ⊢ E Fr On
54a1i 11 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ (⊤ → E Fr On)
63, 5, 5frxp2 8124 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ (⊤ → {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Fr (On × On))
76mptru 1567 . . . . . 6 ⊢ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Fr (On × On)
8 epweon 7758 . . . . . . . . . 10 ⊢ E We On
9 weso 5638 . . . . . . . . . 10 ⊢ ( E We On → E Or On)
10 sopo 5574 . . . . . . . . . 10 ⊢ ( E Or On → E Po On)
118, 9, 10mp2b 10 . . . . . . . . 9 ⊢ E Po On
1211a1i 11 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ (⊤ → E Po On)
133, 12, 12poxp2 8123 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ (⊤ → {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Po (On × On))
1413mptru 1567 . . . . . 6 ⊢ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Po (On × On)
15 epse 5629 . . . . . . . . 9 ⊢ E Se On
1615a1i 11 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ (⊤ → E Se On)
173, 16, 16sexp2 8126 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ (⊤ → {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Se (On × On))
1817mptru 1567 . . . . . 6 ⊢ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Se (On × On)
197, 14, 183pm3.2i 1353 . . . . 5 ⊢ ({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Fr (On × On) ∧ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Po (On × On) ∧ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Se (On × On))
20 on2recs.1 . . . . . 6 ⊢ 𝐹 = frecs({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), 𝐺)
2120fpr2 8285 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Fr (On × On) ∧ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Po (On × On) ∧ {⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))} Se (On × On)) ∧ ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ ∈ (On × On)) → (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))))
2219, 21mpan 700 . . . 4 ⊢ (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ ∈ (On × On) → (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))))
232, 22sylbir 237 . . 3 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))))
241, 23eqtrid 2809 . 2 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (𝐴𝐹𝐵) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))))
253xpord2pred 8125 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = (((Pred( E , On, 𝐴) ∪ {𝐴}) × (Pred( E , On, 𝐵) ∪ {𝐵})) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))
26 predon 7769 . . . . . . . . . 10 ⊢ (𝐴 ∈ On → Pred( E , On, 𝐴) = 𝐴)
2726adantr 484 . . . . . . . . 9 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → Pred( E , On, 𝐴) = 𝐴)
2827uneq1d 4120 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (Pred( E , On, 𝐴) ∪ {𝐴}) = (𝐴 ∪ {𝐴}))
29 df-suc 6352 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ suc 𝐴 = (𝐴 ∪ {𝐴})
3028, 29eqtr4di 2815 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (Pred( E , On, 𝐴) ∪ {𝐴}) = suc 𝐴)
31 predon 7769 . . . . . . . . . 10 ⊢ (𝐵 ∈ On → Pred( E , On, 𝐵) = 𝐵)
3231adantl 485 . . . . . . . . 9 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → Pred( E , On, 𝐵) = 𝐵)
3332uneq1d 4120 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (Pred( E , On, 𝐵) ∪ {𝐵}) = (𝐵 ∪ {𝐵}))
34 df-suc 6352 . . . . . . . 8 ⊢ suc 𝐵 = (𝐵 ∪ {𝐵})
3533, 34eqtr4di 2815 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (Pred( E , On, 𝐵) ∪ {𝐵}) = suc 𝐵)
3630, 35xpeq12d 5678 . . . . . 6 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → ((Pred( E , On, 𝐴) ∪ {𝐴}) × (Pred( E , On, 𝐵) ∪ {𝐵})) = (suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵))
3736difeq1d 4079 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (((Pred( E , On, 𝐴) ∪ {𝐴}) × (Pred( E , On, 𝐵) ∪ {𝐵})) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}) = ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))
3825, 37eqtrd 2797 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))
3938reseq2d 5965 . . 3 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩)) = (𝐹 ↾ ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩})))
4039oveq2d 7412 . 2 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ Pred({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))))
4124, 40eqtrd 2797 1 ⊢ ((𝐴 ∈ On ∧ 𝐵 ∈ On) → (𝐴𝐹𝐵) = (⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩𝐺(𝐹 ↾ ((suc 𝐴 × suc 𝐵) ∖ {⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩}))))
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
